headline: Dividend Safety: Why Retirees Counting on Predictable Income Should Look Past This Packaged Food Giant’s Trillion-Dollar Headwind
summary: The packaged-food aisle has become a graveyard for income stories, with GLP-1 drugs, private label, and tariffs squeezing every legacy brand. J.M. Smucker (NYSE:SJM) sits inside that storm with Folgers, Café Bustelo, Jif, Uncrustables, Milk-Bone, and Hostess on its shelves. For retirees, the question is simple: can the 3.78% yield survive the noise? Dividend Snapshot ... headline: JM Smucker eyes margin boost with lower green coffee commodity costs
summary: The Folgers coffee maker introduced temporary price reductions due to the lower input costs, but stopped short of permanent cuts.
